title: Listrostachys henriquesiana
intro: Listrostachys henriquesiana, also known as "Cunha grass," is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. The health benefits of Listrostachys henriquesiana include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. Bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Listrostachys henriquesiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and treat various conditions.
